reviews.title: Excellent keyboard - works with VIA configurator out of the box
reviews.text: Excellent build quality, just add switches & keycaps and go.  Underglow looks fantastic.  PCB supports through-hole LED switch backlighting, though obviously this would make changing switches more complicated - I'll probably try that on my next build.

title: YMDK ANSI ISO PBT Doubleshot Shine Through Pudding Keycaps Suitable for MX Mechanical Keyboard Corsair Razer SF KBD75 Tada68 DZ60 (Black Pudding Full Set)(Only Keycap)

reviews.title: Looks great, shows off my RGB light on my Keychron  K4 now.
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:2f9f1dbaca0dc20e2ddfad733f0e051c]] Looks great, shows off my RGB lights on my Keychron K4 now. The only downside is not having the function icons on the keys anymore. I’ll have to work on getting some little stickers.
Edit:Added a Movie Clip

reviews.title: Great but some keys may not be suitable for your keyboard
reviews.text: they look really pretty tbh. However some keys had fitment issues. The spacebar had their slots just a little bit off so it couldnt fit. The caps lock is upside down. The windows and menu keys did not like being next to other keys. Other than that, the rest of the keys fit great.

reviews.title: They work great
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:eaa9e5229cc02ed31da7ef98d0a78ee4]] Replaced the most of my bottom row on my keyboard with these key caps.  They are good, the LED shines through and it really nice! for Corsair keyboards.

reviews.title: Quality can be improved but overall great price and compatibility
reviews.text: One of the few sets that actually fit my K95 (Corsair bottom row) Plenty of extra pieces for other keyboards too. The color black of these pieces appear much more grey compared to he caps my keyboard came with. And each piece has a little dimple at the top where they were cast or molded. Not the end of the world, but other sets don't have that. Also found small imperfections in several pieces. Time will tell how they do over prolonged use. Pretty good for the price, solid 4 of 5.

reviews.title: Just what I needed
reviews.text: I wanted some keycaps to match the theme of my keyboard but it's a struggle finding keycaps that fit the sizing of R1 on a Corsair keyboard. This is exactly what I needed!

title: Coral Sea Keycaps 108 PBT Heat Sublimation OEM Profile Keycap for Cherry Mx Gateron Kailh Switch Mechanical Keyboard
features: 【PBT Dye Sublimation】With high-quality PBT keycaps and an anti-grease coating, these 108-key keycaps provide top-notch durability and a great feel for your typing. Advanced five-sided sublimation technology makes the pattern not fade.
【Ukiyoe Style】Exquisite Ukiyo-e style bring a new experience. the keycaps are crafted with extra-thick walls fit for intensive gaming that produce satisfying, solid keystrokes.

【Excellent Craftsmanship】Using injection molding technology, waterproof and dustproof design, easy to clean up dirt. Floating keycap design, uniform light transmission, making the lighting effect obvious.
【OEM Profile Keycaps】 This keycap set is OEM profile which is higher than Cherry profile. It is not easy to fatigue after long-term use and has better comfort.
【Warm Tips】Keycaps only, The keyboard in the picture is only for the demo and is not for sale.

reviews.title: Looks great, types great
reviews.text:
The caps are thick and wide so typing on them is a pleasure. I also love the oriental graphics of ocean waves and whales. The only gripe would be the packaging box is a bit robust in need of better designs and material. Otherwise, this is a great product. Oh also better font selection would be better too, especially the non-capitalized letters on the pause vs page up vs page down vs delete vs insert buttons. They seem inconsistent.

I would pay an extra $5 if this keycap set supports 65% or 68% design.

reviews.title: You get what you pay for
reviews.text:
Overall it's a decent set and a good value. However, I noticed a number of stains on the keys, incorrect legends (the n in the End key), reversed prints (colon/semicolon and apostrophe/quotation were swapped), and misaligned legends (the F9 is not in line with the other F keys).

I would probably not buy from this seller or manufacturer again due to this.

reviews.title: Not great
reviews.text: My son got it for gaming and we returned it after one day because the keys were sticking. That’s clearly not ideal for a gamer.

Note：
During the delivery process, the pins of the switch may touch and bend. This is inevitable. Bent pins can be straightened with nail clippers, which will not affect normal use.

Main Parameters：Gateron Yellow Switch---Linear feel (straight up and down), Actuation force is about 50±15gf.Over 50 million laboratory tests ensure durability and more stable and reliable quality.

Suitable For：Gateron Yellow Switch---The yellow switch feels smooth, rebounds faster, and feels stronger when pressed. You can feel it making the keycap follow your fingers more closely. The yellow switch is our recommended switch for those who feel that the red switch is too light, too soft, and needs a little stronger feedback.
Installation Type:Plate mounted switches (3 pins)
Package Included：1 puller tool and 66 Yellow Switches ‘+’ shape and PP protection box.

title: 141 Keys Botanical Keycaps Cherry Profile PBT Dye Sub Keycap Set Suitable for 61/64/68/84/87/96/104/108 Cherry Mx Switches Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
features: 【PBT Keycaps】These 141 cherry profile keycaps are made of thick PBT material, with a matte texture and anti-grease coating, which can provide good durability and typing.

【Cherry Profile】This set of pbt keycaps uses the cherry height, which is higher than the XDA profile. It's ergonomically designed, so you will not feel tired even if you type or play games for a long time.
【Rugged and Durable】The thickness of these keycaps are about 1.4~1.5mm, so the keycaps are very durable. The thick PBT material will effectively extend the service life of the keycaps.

【Wide Selection】These keycaps are suitable for most keyboards, such as 61/64/68/84/87/96/104/108 cherry mx switches mechanical Keyboards.If you are not sure whether this keycaps set is fit for your keyboard, please consult customer service.
【Warm Tips】This product is a set of keycaps, not a keyboard. If the keycaps are missing or cracked, don't worry, we'll send you new replacement keys.

reviews.title: OMG great keycap set!
reviews.text:
I have been looking for these sets for the longest time, outside of GB and these guys have made a solid replica. i am so impressed with the quality and feel of these Botanical keycap sets that the premium sets can remain on the shelf. They look so nice and very very close and clean to the originals.

the only way you can tell that they are not GMK is by looking at the bottom. The dye-sub is a little weak in the finish but you never look under the hood.

If you like the greenery landscape or the color great fanatic this is the best set. It's super clean, subtle, and sounds great! I have this set on my KBD67 Lite and it sounds so much better than my ABS keycaps i paid $80 for. The texture is also very nice and I seem to be keen on this rough like texture than the ABS smoother feel. It kind of is matte if that makes sense. The legends on all the alphas are uniform, no thickness issues. The ,.? and other modifiers might have a thinner font but negligible.

I can't say enough what a great first impression these sets have given me and if they produce an "Oblivian" replica i'm jumping on it as well. Pictures to come, after I pickup my desk from all the loose keycaps.

reviews.title: Great sound
reviews.text: Don’t wait years for a gmk set these are just as good lol

title: Kraken Coiled Keyboard Cable - Artisan Coiled USB C Cable with Aviator Connector for Mechanical Gaming Keyboards (Pure White)
features: Premium Artisan Designs in colors to fit every gaming setup!
Heavy Duty 5 Pin Aviator Connector (Easy to connect, and looks AMAZING)
Double Sleeved for enhanced looks and durability!
5 Feet long to reach your keyboard anywhere in your setup

reviews.title: Excellent quality cable and connectors, but color is more purple than blue
reviews.text:
Update: Oddly enough, this did not work with a Drop Alt keyboard. It worked with a few other keyboards just fine though. Just a word of warning for anyone pairing this cable with a Drop Alt (or maybe any other Drop keyboard).

This is the third coiled cable I have ordered, and it's definitely the best quality overall. The cable itself is thick and good quality. The coil is a bit firm, but nothing too unusual. The intermediate connector is all metal and heavy. Both sides of the intermediate connector can be unthreaded: The side going to the USB-C connector, and the side going to the USB connector.

One interesting thing I noticed was that the end connectors have a color matched almost shrink wrap thickness strain protection around them. The USB side is the most noticeable, and the USB-C side is a bit thicker. As long as there is enough strain protection, I actually prefer the less bulky end connections.

The only nit is the color. Even though it looked dark purplish in the product listing, I was hoping that it would be more blue in real life. It's not, it's an attractive dark purple. I would assume the color represented in the product listing is accurate, in case you're wondering if there is any color variation from the listing photos to real life.

reviews.title: Good quality!
reviews.text: The thickness is nice and has a good feel when typing. I personally like the font on these keys compared to a lot of the others found on Amazon. It's very clean and sleek. The colors are very pastel though, so in some lightings it's hard to differentiate between the two colors as there's not much contrast. I eventually just switched out the pastel purple caps for darker purple caps I already had. Overall they're really nice and fit my Anne Pro 2 perfectly. (Bonus: The case for storing the keys is also pretty fancy).

reviews.title: Poor man's white fox.
reviews.text:
I put them on a Quisan Magicforce 68 key mechanical keyboard. The legends and not as pronounced / readable as the stock key caps, they also seat closer to the board which leads to a shorter key press. Quite happy with the product for the price. They feel very nice.

Look grey in the photos but are bright white.

reviews.title: A great replacement for any stock ABS keycaps
reviews.text: A great replacement for any stock ABS keycaps! Not the highest quality PBT, but still thicker than ABS and its doubleshot with clean text. Some compatibility issues with space bar and shift keys(or any larger keys), due to these not having stabalizers. So they wiggle a little bit. But not uncomfortable or hard to use if you deal with it.

reviews.title: Amazing build quality!
reviews.text: These key caps are as advertised. Very high quality key caps with a variety of colors available. Was shipped in a very organize box with the keys all separated so you dont have to dig through the box to find any particular keys. So far I am satisfy with the product. Will see how it holds up

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Excellent keycaps for the price..

title: ikbc W200 Wireless Mechanical Keyboard with Cherry MX Red Switch for Windows and Mac OS, Enables Media Key and LED Indicator (2.4G Dongle, USB 2.0, PBT Double Shot 87 Keycaps, Black Color, ANSI/US)
features: ▼ Mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Red Switches (Linear): A linear, lighter but does not have tactile bump and audible click found comparing with Cherry MX Blue switches. Cherry MX Red is ideal for gaming where the low articulation force and linear path allow for quick successive key presses. Typing with Cherry MX Red switches is similar to browns, though it does lack tactile feedback and It is always the best preference for gamers.
▼ A durable computer keyboard with PBT Double Shot keycaps for Ergonomic Keycap Shapes designed to provide you with durable, long lasting and comfortable typing experience.

▼ Plug-And-Play Simplicity. : Setup takes seconds—you simply plug the wireless receiver into a USB port and start using your keyboard right away without software. 100% Anti-ghosting with 6-key Rollover and convenient FN Multimedia Shortcuts Keys.

▼ Other Features : Original Cherry MX Switch-Each Reliable Switches Rated for 50 million Typing Times. Using 2.4Ghz Wireless can Connectivity-Up to 6 Month Long Standby Time. Product structure include the Smart Power Indicator Light and 2 Adjustable Feetstand Height.
▼ What You Can Get: iKBC Cherry MX Red switch mechanical keyboard x1, 2.4G wireless dongle x1 (equipped inside battery area), AAA batteries x2, dust cover x1, key puller x1, user manual x1.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text:
It meets all my needs. I got it to replace a wireless Velocifire keyboard whose internal battery was dying. I had to plug my old one in everyday as I couldn’t see the key labels without the backlight, and it’s built in battery life decreased from 5 to 1 days over a couple years. So it was essentially wired, while I prefer the wireless aesthetic.

This one avoids the backlight killing the battery life as well as internal battery degradation. I can see the key labels fine without a backlight, and it takes replaceable batteries. Battery life should be months without the backlight, and it even has a low battery warning light. No cord to deal with.

Seems well built, heavy, and doesn’t slide on the desk. Nice price point. Easy to set up. It even has multiple tilt angle (height) options, although I like it flat. TKL is great to minimize the distance to reach the mouse, improving ergonomics.

I went from brown to red switches as that’s all that was in stock, and it was an easy change, although I could tell a slight difference initially.

reviews.title: Quite Loud
reviews.text:
If you can't stand the sound of a clacking keyboard, this isn't for you. It can get quite loud, especially when you're typing fairly quickly. This is probably better for techies who like the intense sound and the tactile key interface. The lighting is also nice. I can recommend this keyboard for those who either live or work alone.

Thanks so much for taking the time to read this review. I hope the information that I've provided helps make your decision a little easier.

reviews.title: A No-Cable Classic For Writers
reviews.text:
I am not lying: This is hands down the best keyboard for writing I have used in the last twenty years. I liked the older acrylic Apple keyboard and I own a mechanical keyboard with click-switches (blue), but this one makes touch typing so much more comfortable.
I wasn’t sure if I would like the tactile keys without click, because I actually like the click. They are just very loud. Logitech’s K845 (with Cherry MX red) is a great keyboard as well, but louder and has a cable.
I wish this keyboard would be backlit though. Black keyboards in front of big screens need some sort of illumination. I got one of these USB LED lights that I plugged behind my monitor, that half-solves the problem by providing some backlight.
Still it’s awesome to write on it. It’s focus is to be a mechanical keyboard. So much that it seems that it skipped the product design. It looks like an OEM-Keyboard from 1995. That’s in a way uncompromisingly functional, but next to a modern flat butterfly keyboard it looks like someone parked an old Volvo next to a Miata.
The quality is good. The keycaps are heavy and lettering sharp. It might be confusing for some that the ‘upper’ characters are printed next to the main set in the same size.
Battery life seems not to be a problem. I am pretty much writing all day, and I’m still on the first set of batteries that came in the package.
PROS AND CONS
+ Precise keyboard for touch-typing
+ Quiet enough for shared work areas
+ Height adjustable
+ Great quality
+ Long Battery life
+ Connects via dongle, not Bluetooth (yes, for me that’s a pro. Bluetooth sucks)
+ Compact with no number pad

- Chunky design
- No backlight
- Very heavy
- Vague keycap lettering
- No number pad (*conflict*)
I can recommend this keyboard to anyone who is typing over a long amount of times. It takes a while to get used to, but once adjusted it’s less tiring than modern butterfly or rubber cap keyboards, because the keys don’t bottom out that easily, and feel better to the fingertips. I took a few photos. I hope it helps to make a decision.

reviews.title: Silent Cherry Red Switches Work Well With Family Room Computer
reviews.text:
While the cherry MX red keys are often used for gaming, I am reviewing this as a typing keyboard in a family room, where the loud clackity clack of a keyboard is unwelcome. And I find this keyboard to be a great solution for such an environment.

This keyboard paired so effortlessly with my Mac that I wasn’t even aware it happened. I checked the keys for their mapping, and found them to be as one would expect for a Windows keyboard—just the usual issue with the non-Apple standard keys near the Shift key.

It is not “full-size,” but 80% size, so it is somewhat smaller, but not so much so that you fee cramped.

They keys are as silent as advertised. And while an old-school touch typist might miss the “click” feedback of a mechanical keyboard, these keys have decent travel, so if you are typing, you will have little doubt that you have actually engaged the key. (I can’t talk to gaming with these.)

I have had no trouble with the bluetooth connection, nor the responsiveness while typing.

If I have any reliability issues, I will be sure to revisit this review as necessary.

title: nuphy Air60 Portable Wireless Keyboard, 60% Low Profile Mechanical Keyboard, Supports Bluetooth 5.0, 2.4G and Wired Connection, Compatible with Windows and Mac OS Systems-Gateron Brown Switch
features: ✨【The new upgrade】：NuType F1 is highly praised by many users. On this basis, we have upgraded NuType F1 in all aspects and got the latest Air60 low-shaft mechanical keyboard. It adopts 60% layout (64 keys), bright color scheme, and the design of low shaft will not hurt your wrist after using the keyboard for a long time. The wide keycap design can help reduce the number of keystroke errors.

💻【Three-mode design】：Each user's usage is different. Based on user needs, we try to adapt the Air60 to as many users as possible, so the Air60 keyboard supports 2.4G, Bluetooth wireless connection and type C wired connection, and can connect up to 4 equipments at the same time to meet more complex user needs.

💪【Alternative laptop keyboard】：The four foot pads on the back of the Air60 can be perfectly embedded between the keys of the notebook keyboard. Typing on the Air60 will not touch the notebook keyboard at the bottom, giving notebook users a better typing experience. It is compatible with most laptops on the market, including the latest Macbooks.

💡【60% Portable Keyboard】：Compared with Air75, Air60 has no F area and will be smaller in size. If you don’t use F area often, Air60 is undoubtedly a better choice for use on the go; if you often use a laptop, Air60 can be perfectly placed. On the keyboard of the notebook computer, it is currently suitable for the vast majority of computers on the market, especially the Mac series, and it is more convenient to carry.

🔋【2500mAh battery】：The battery size of the Air60 wireless keyboard is 2500 mAh. The laboratory test time is more than 48 hours, which can meet the needs of a week of office work. When the backlight mode is turned off, the use time can be greatly increased.

reviews.title: Works great. Battery life is pathetic
reviews.text: Keyboard works great. Compact. Keys are responsible with good travel. The battery, however, lasts just about a day, which is unacceptable.

reviews.title: Didn't think low profile could feel this good...
reviews.text:
I was hesitant to try out this keyboard because I have always avoided low profile mechanical keyboards.

Maybe because I did actually type very well and fast with the chic-lit style keyboards that this keyboard reminds me of and I am too deep into the mechanical keyboard hobby to really want to move to low profile.

I am glad I took the leap!

I really like the way the browns feel on this keyboard. It is a pleasure to type on and the space bars and other stabilized keys feel great. Out of the box I don't think there is anything you need to do to this keyboard except use it!

Some things will take getting use to like the smaller shift button. I actually wouldn't mind if this board was spread out a bit more to allow for more traditional length buttons, but I'm sure it is something I could pick up quickly.

The build quality feels excellent and the polished steel plate on the bottom is a great touch. It really looks classy and I love the look of this keyboard. Nuphy's color-ways have always been super slick to me and this is no different.

The board has awesome RGB effects that you can change easily from the board itself. It connects wired, through bluetooth, or through a 2.4ghz adapter. Bluetooth connected instantly and works super well.

It comes with a ton of accessories, from magnetic feet to tilt the board a bit to extra keycaps, pullers, switches, stickers, and the instructions are also a poster of an anime chick which would probably look good in a gamer style room.

I am really tempted to try and use this board as a daily driver but right now I'm using it with it sitting on my M1 Macbook Airs keyboard and it is working great for that use case. It is thin enough that it doesn't block the screen or anything like that.

I have another compact 60% board that has the same goals as this Nuphy board and it misses the mark. Nuphy really hit the nail on the head with this board.

title: YUNZII Keynovo V2 Coiled Keyboard Cable with Aviator USB Cable for Type-C Mechanical Gaming Keyboard (White)

The keyboard cable takes USB-A side with metal aviation, Type-C plug, two-section cable connection, and detachable design. The coiled keyboard cable delivers a high-performance in every aspect, elegant addition to any setup.

【 HIGH-PERFORMANCE QUALITY】This performance-tested keyboard cable with a flexible coiled design, metal aviator, durable TPE material. It delivers superior and high-end quality and visual aesthetics. The cable is an ideal replacement cable for any mechanical keyboard.

【LONGER LENGTH AND WIDER COMPATIBILITY】The V2 custom coiled aviator cable has upgraded length wit 155cm straight cable, and 14cm coiled cable. The total length of the cable reaches 170cm. The coil cable diameter is 2cm. Compared to last version, the upgraded V2 keyboard cable can be compatible with most mechanical keyboard, e.g KC84.

* ONLY CABLE INCLUDED!【USB-C INTERFACE, USB 2.0/3.0 COMPATIBLE】Designed to work flawlessly with any USB type C device, the USB to Type-C coiled aviator cable works with mechanical gaming keyboard and type-c mobile phones charging.

reviews.title: Decent. Kind of small coil.
reviews.text:
YUNZII AKKO Coiled Keyboard Cable with Aviator USB Cable for Type-C Mechanical Gaming Keyboard (Sakura)

This cable just ok. It's not bad but definitely lacks the quality feel of others. The coil is small around 1/2" outer diameter. The connections are good and fit in my keyboard well and the aviator cable looks good. For me, the cable from the coil to the USBc connector is a bit too long and looks kind of weird being so far away from the keyboard. Also, the coil just looks like an old phone coiled cable. It just isn't for me, but the price is good, and it doesn't look half bad.

title: DROP + Matt3o MT3 Susuwatari Custom Keycap Set, ABS Hi-Profile Keycaps, Doubleshot Legends, Cherry MX Compatible Set for Ortholinear Mechanical Keyboards (Ortholinear)
features: A GROUNDBREAKING PROFILE, BACK FOR MORE: Sculpted in Hi-Profile, Matt3o’s groundbreaking MT3 /dev/tty custom keycap set changed the way we type.

FROM THE IBM TERMINAL TO THE DESKTOP: Based on the profile form the iconic IBM beamspring terminals of the 1970s, this custom set is fully sculpted in Hi-Profile. From its heavily slanted design to the scooped, contoured tops of each cap, the set recreates the feel of vintage keyboards.

DOUBLESHOT LEGENDS: As opposed to a dye-sublimiation process, these doubleshot legends are permanently molded inside the keycap, thus becoming an integral part of it. This ensures reliable legends and continuity throughout the set.
ORTHOLINEAR: For ortho keyboards like the Drop Planck, Preonic, and other boards with similar layouts.
SPECS: Produced by Drop and designed by Matt3o, ABS Hi-Profile MT3 keycaps, Doubleshot legends, MX compatible, and Fully sculpted based on IBM beamspring keycaps.

reviews.title: Absolute necessity on ortholinear boards
reviews.text:
These keycaps are thick, double shot so they will never fade, and sculpted. With ortholinear keyboards, these keycaps really help adjusting to smaller modifer key size and different key layout.

Pros:
1. Thick: This helps lower the pitch of the sound, which makes it sound quieter.
2. Doubleshot ABS: No wearing out the legends. The font is also fairly thick, making it much more legible than some other keycaps.
3. MT3 profile: The sculpted profile really makes it very comfortable to use and helps reduce hitting the wrong keys. No sharp edges due to the spherical shape. Very enjoyable for typing. The profile is much higher though so that could be an issue for some people.
4. Multiple profile options for certain keys: For example, the Ctrl and Esc keycs come in profiles that would allow it to be the top row or 3rd row. Space bar comes as two 1u, two 1.5u, and one 2u.
5. Storage tray and box: This seems silly to put as a pro but the tray and box it comes with make it easy to store unused or keycaps it replaced. Other Keycaps come in a zip lock bag that will just be a jumbled mess.

Cons:
1. Price. This is really expensive for a set of keycaps but this is the normal price for any specialty keycaps. It is what it is.
2. Limitation of scultped profile: Putting key profiles meant for row 1 in row 3 feels awkward so you might end you designing your keymap partially based on keycap profiles. Also might end up rotating some keycaps like row 5 Raise or Lower layer keycaps to make it more comfortable.
3. ABS option only. The PBT version is in white only. So if you prefer the color with the material that it isn't made it, then you're out of luck.
4. Limited to buying sets if you need extra keys: If you need more keys, you have to order a set. I would like to have more 1.5u blank keycaps but don't want to buy multiple sets just for the few pieces I want.

reviews.title: I like them
reviews.text:
These are my daily drivers, I use them on a Drop CTRL with Glorious Panda switches. Initially I thought the MT3 profile was disorienting, but after using them for a while, I am quite fond of it. I acknowledge that not everyone will like this profile though, and that should be considered if you are buying this product (or any like it). If you can find an MT3 set to try first before dumping about two hundred dollars on keycaps, it would be a **very good** idea. Other things go without saying, the thickness is very good the weight on my switches feels good and not like its making keys too easy to press or anything. I really like the theme, but all of that considered, I bought this specifically for the VI keys (hjkl with arrows) because I thought they looked super cool.

The price for these keycaps is a good deterrent for most people, for good reason. However this high of a price is pretty standard for high quality keycaps, as well as the Drop.com-exclusive MT3 profile.

This leads me to the value for money, its expensive and definitely should only be bought if you have a hankering to spend money on some expensive keycaps or you really really like having a specific row of keycaps.
Brightness is a 1 star because they're not shine-through keycaps, as they should be.
Gaming is a 4 star because, like, Sure? nothing about these keycaps keep you from gaming.

reviews.title: Best 3rd party caps I've ever owned.
reviews.text:
I really liked the esthetics of these key caps because I was looking for something which resembled "Old Nasa" feel, and these were the best I could find. The ergonomics were also great and everything has a very nice and snug fit, unlike the original keycaps that came with my CTRL keyboard.

I only wish that the "additional" buttons came with the normal key caps for the money I spent on the original "package". $30 for about 10 extra keys I can use on my ten keyless is VERY steep.

reviews.title: Best keycap set
reviews.text: I love this set. Worth every penny.

reviews.title: Absolutely gorgeous
reviews.text: Wonderful keycaps , goes great on my Nyquist Keyboard, looks professional yet custom, I highly recommend.

Note to those with costar stabilizers, the key caps do not come with MX Keycap Stabilizer Inserts... so if your old keys are like mine and the old ones are apparently glued in, you'll need these to finish the keyboard. You can find them to 3d print pretty easily.

These were a great price among the similar sets I found and were an affordable way to dive into my first customization. I wanted some kinda retro keys and I just love em!

reviews.title: I liked it very much until it started disconnecting
reviews.text:
I've only had it for a week and the type C end moves and it disconnects from my keyboard. it's not a lot but enough to power off my key board.

But, aside from that little piece of failure, i really like the sturdiness and the quality of the work on it. It's also at a great price. That's why i'm not returning this item, it's actually really good and as long as the cable is held in place it works great. Maybe it's my WFH wonky setup. I would buy more if i needed more cables, but I'm set for life with cables.

really nice cable, i would recommend to others.

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: Purchased for my son.  He says it works great.

reviews.title: Great upgrade for any Keyboard, best with custom rugged builds.
reviews.text: I wanted to get a substitute USB-C cable for my keyboard and found this listing. Was intrigued by the interchangeable inputs as well as the mechanical design. The price seemed steep, but the uses, ergonomics and possible durability of the cable seemed like a good investment. Mine came functional with an included "Kraken Keybaord" sticker, thank you! The only problem I found was that the USB-C male input was a tad long for my ANNE PRO Clone, a Dierya x Kemove DK61 60% Keyboard. It might be my keyboard's own build quality, or that maybe these cables are meant for more rugged custom boards. If I move my keyboard drastically it might disconnect, but luckily that rarely happens. I'm more than satisfied with the cable, more like enamored. I'd buy again for a future custom keyboard build for sure.

reviews.title: Good Keycap Set! Beat Expectations
reviews.text:
I had initially bought this keycap set as a placeholder for my GMK Samurai Keycap set that I was set to receive. However, I had learned that Drop would ship them in late July, and since I was unsure if I was getting a refund, I bought this keycap set as a placeholder.

This keycap set broke all expectations that I held for cheap keycaps. They feel to be of good quality, with a high-ish thock sound that is what I wanted. Overall, it is a good keycap set that I would recommend to people if they are looking for good quality and good-sounding keycaps.

Also, I did get a refund for the GMK keycaps so I will be sticking with these keycaps, although they don't match as they were not meant to pair together and were rather a last-minute decision.

reviews.title: Great Keycaps for the price!!
reviews.text: When these keycaps came in I wasn't expecting a whole lot because of the price but surprisingly they're actually pretty nice. Usually on cheaper sets like this the legending and print quality can vary quite a bit but these keycaps were really consistent and is on par with some other sets I've had that cost twice as much so that was nice to see. Overall they're pretty great for the price and I honestly recommend them if you if you're looking for "designer" style keycaps.

reviews.title: Beautiful keycaps for designers!
reviews.text: These keycaps are beautiful! I use photoshop often so I already have the shortcuts memorized but having these keycaps are just so nice regardless. They feel really nice and thick, the printing on them is nice and clear, and I love the color way for them. I dont use this board often even when working in photoshop and really just use this board and keycap set as a decorative piece to add to my collection of keyboards. I love these keycaps!!

reviews.title: Perfect starter Artisan keycap!
reviews.text:
Edit: purchased the black AND the white one. 10/10

I purchased this keycap as I wanted an artisan but did not want to have to pay resale on ebay or Mechmarket. After a quick search, I was glad to find this combo as it covers the escape key AND the tab key in a matching set. I tried both keycaps on multiple boards and I am thoroughly impressed.

I can easily say that this keycap set will fit both regular MX stems and box stems, as they fit on my box inks and NK creams without issue. I swapped them on 6 different boards just to see how they looked with different sets and did not find there to be any loosening.

Being able to change the "screen" is a fun touch but I am leaving it on the apple logo for nostalgia. The keyboard on the tab key is magnetic and I have found myself playing with it while working today.

Overall this is an easy 10/10 for both price and quality. I highly recommend it for both enthusiasts who want a fun budget set but also for anyone with a keyboard in general!

reviews.title: Spacebars do not fit well
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:14b0c07be1bf5b90e20f388d925ce8c8]] The keycap set is great in terms of design, modifier key size options, and key legend for quality for price. Fitting for all keys is great, excepts for the large spacebars.
The space bars (both 6.25u and 7u) in my set don’t work smoothly and somehow get the stabs stuck (two different kinds of stabs as well). I tried them on two keyboards (one with 7u and other with 6.25u) and only these spacebars showed problems and the other spacebars I have do not show this problem. I am not sure really whats causing the space bar issue, maybe those pbt space keycaps are slightly bent (as I have read about) but visually they look okay.

reviews.title: Good Quality for the $ - Fits Cherry MX Switches
reviews.text:
This fit my Ducky mechanical keyboard without issue. They seem to be well made and fit tightly in my cherry MX switches. A couple observations, not sure it’s a positive or a negative but a point of observation:

1) They do not come with media key replacements. The blue ones you see in my image are from my original key caps

2) The height of the keys are slightly shorter than my Ducky OEMs. While initially this was a possible concern for me, having typed with the new keys for a couple weeks, seems to not impact typing at all.

3) The blue caps that came with the replacements are not the ones you see in my photo (Enter key). They have a slightly yellow / blue hue to them vs. the Ducky’s I’m using. Wanted my enter key to match the rest of the blue media keys so I mixed and matched. Some may like the blue that comes with the set, I just preferred my original blue keys color.

For the price, they fit the bill, can’t complain. We’ll see long term how the printing of the keys holds up / how quickly they wear down.

Wish list:

- Caps lock key had the word ‘Caps’ on it
- Windows button keys had something besides “Super”.

Overall good purchase.

title: Doohoeek Updated Retro Typewriter Keyboard with White Lighting, Muti-Device Multi-OS Bluetooth & Wired Mechanical Keyboard for Laptops, Vintage Keyboard with Cradle for Mac OS/iOS/Windows/Android
features: New Version for More Flexibility: The 2022 updated typewriter keyboard is compatible with more operating system (MacOS and iOS) and also simplify the connectivity and switch process with easy connect switch button.

Retro Typewriter Style Design: The wood finished surface, retro round keys and typewriter-like looks provide good balance between functional keyboard and vintage decoration. Best decors and functional keyboard for your office or home setups.

Multi-OS with Easy Switch Button: The keyboard is compatible with Mac OS, iOS, Windows and Android operating system and only simply tap on the switch button at the top right corner to change the configiration.

Pair up to 4 Devices with Seamless Switch: The keyboard supports 3 Bluetooth and 1 wired connectivity. Only simply press switch button at the top right corner to switch between Bluetooth and wired mode. (For more details about Bluetooth connectivity please scroll down to product description)
Responsive and Fluid Keystrokes for Heavy Users: All key anti-ghosting and lifespan of over 50 million clicks provide fluid and responsive typing experience for writers, gamers, coders, etc.

Beautiful White Lighting Effects: The various lighting effects allow you to type day or night while decorating your desktop setups . Only need to fiddle with the “return” bar and left-hand knob to change lighting effects and its brightness.

Long Lasting Battery: With 2000mah rechargeable battery only about 6 hours charging the keyboard has 16-hour continuouse working time (backlighting on). Note: Working time may vary based on use and computer conditions.

What You Get: 1 x Retro Typewriter Keyboard, 2 x Blue Switch, 1 x Metal Switch Puller, 1 x USB-C Cable for Charging/Connection, 1 x User Manual; 12-month warranty & a ready support team for any issues.

reviews.title: LOVE IT
reviews.text: I absolutely 💯 ♥️ love this keyboard! It reminds me of typing class in high school. If you want nostalgia this is your product. It does make a very satisfying loud clicking when typing so do not buy if you need something quiet. Now my sister wants one too!

reviews.title: I am in love
reviews.text: I never thought I can fall in love with a keyboard! This keyboard is esthetically beautiful. I love this clicking sound…not quite like the real typewriter but kinda close:)  Light effects make typing even more fun

reviews.title: Beautiful keyboard
reviews.text: The keyboard is absolutely unique and stunning, I just received it yesterday so I have not typed on it very much but it seems pretty heavy duty and the back lighting is awesome especially with bad eyesight, The return arm regulates the lights to make it very smooth to adjust, The typewriter knobs actually do the volume on your computer so all in all I do love the keyboard, The wireless feature actually was pretty easy to set up just read the instructions carefully!  I have never spent more than $40 on a keyboard and wireless mouse but I have to tell you well worth it.

reviews.title: nice build. aesthetically interesting looking.
reviews.text: I tried to return this thinking it has connectivity issues but troubleshot my way to realize it was OS messin' with me.  Glad I gave it a another whirl because it's really nice!  one thing it does do is the lower keys next to the space button are all the same height and my fat lower palm always hits them and sends me to the beginning of the sentence I'm writing.  Annoying and somewhat dangerous for my line of work but I solved it by putting elevation risers at the front raising it approximately another 8-10 degrees.  Would have been nice if it had elevation standoffs as standard equipment.  bluetooth on this is fantastic and responsive.

title: YUNZII AKKO CS Switch, 3 Pins for DIY MX Mechanical Keyboard, 45 pcs (Ocean Blue Switch)
features: 【About AKKO CS Switches】 AKKO Custom Series (CS) switches are the newly designed 3-pin switches for customers who have specific typing and gaming needs. Each package has 45 switches. Six types of switches are available and no matter which kind of typing feeling you want, we cover it all.

【Compatibility】AKKO CS switches are designed with a general MX structure so that they can fit most keycaps sets. The switch has 3 pins but also fit in all 3 pins and 5 pins keyboards. Based on the strong compatibility, you can easily change the switch and customize your mechanical keyboard.
【Built-in LED Slot 】The AKKO CS switches are equipped with a north-facing LED slot for LED modification. It is also compatible with SMD LED, provides more fun and options for keyboard enthusiasts.

【Durable Lifespan & Improved Performance】With a lifespan of approximately 50 million times of keystrokes, you are assured of high quality and a long lifespan. The CS switches feature a spiral spring design that can make the typing more comfortable.

【Ocean Blue Tactile Switch】The tactile bump of the Ocean Blue switch is at 0.55mm and it ends at 1.88mm, which gives long-continued feedback. Different from the blue and brown switch, the Ocean blue switch has a medium tactile position that can give you an excellent experience in typing and gaming.

reviews.title: Very good for the price
reviews.text: I'm not a mechanical keyboard connoisseur, but needed to replace the switches on my cheap Redragon keyboard to get rid of the loud clicking noise. The original switches were blue switch clones and the clicks will wake up the neighbors. These are cheap enough that I decided to give them a try. They are pretty good in terms of touch and sound, from my perspective and my use. Will definitely resort to these again in the future if I need to replace keyboard switches, especially for budget keyboards.

Compact size and fashionable design.Perfectly for any working space.(NOTE:①The USB receiver is located in the groove at the bottom of the mouse and is pulled out and inserted②if the keyboard and mouse appear work slower condition,please consider replace battery,it maybe because the battery out of power)

reviews.title: Frequent disconnections.
reviews.text: It works ok, but the mouse keeps disconnecting and they keyboard is sometimes unresponsive. Since I mostly game on my PC this is extremely annoying. I do like the look and feel of the keyboard and mouse, the disconnection issues are my only problem. (and since another wireless keyboard and mouse don't have the problem on the same PC, I know I don't have interference issues or badly set settings)

reviews.title: Works good
reviews.text: Bought this for my sons birthday. Gave it to him a little early. He seems to love it. He’s not had a complaint one about it.

reviews.title: Used for pc gaming
reviews.text: Works fine. Sometimes I had problems with the mouse signal, moving USB port closer to mouse helped. Keys aren’t the most comfortable but I’ll get used to them. Worth it for the money

reviews.title: Ty
reviews.text: Ty

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.text: My son wanted this for gaming. He enjoys the size of the keyboard and mouse. The colors are vibrant and the keys don't stick as bad as other keyboards. Would recommend for a great price.
